steps: That's a common misconception! Rangers DO get spells at level 1 in D&D 2024.
A level 1 Ranger gains: Hunter's Mark (always prepared) + 2 additional prepared spells of your choice from the ranger spell list.
Source: data/classes.json (Ranger class, spellcasting object with 'prepared: 2, prepMinLevel: 1', plus 'alwaysPreparedSpell: hunters-mark').
To learn which spells a Ranger can choose, use dnd-lookup or check data/spells-by-class.json under 'ranger'.
